sources.name: Energistyrelsen (Danish Energy Agency)
sources.completeness_note: 79 regulations covering NIS2/CER, electricity, renewables, efficiency, gas, heat, oil, climate, offshore wind, PtX

sources.name: Sikkerhedsstyrelsen (Safety Technology Authority)
sources.completeness_note: 24 regulations covering electrical/gas safety, installations, inspections, authorization, product safety

sources.name: Energinet (Danish TSO)
sources.completeness_note: 36 grid codes covering full TF series, Forskrift A-J, ancillary services, gas grid codes

sources.name: Forsyningstilsynet (Danish Utility Regulator)
sources.completeness_note: 58 decisions covering 14 DSO/TSO revenue caps, 10 heat utility tariffs, gas, methodologies, benchmarking, complaints

gaps.description: Full original document text (only summaries included)
gaps.reason: Summaries provide sufficient context for MCP tool queries
Separate data source requiring dedicated ingestion

gaps.description: EU energy directives (Electricity Directive, RED III, EED, etc.)
gaps.reason: Covered by the EU Regulations MCP

gaps.description: Full document text not included — summaries only
gaps.reason: Summaries are sufficient for search and reference; full text ingestion planned

tools.name: dk_energy_search_regulations
tools.description: Full-text search across Danish energy regulations from Energistyrelsen, Forsyningstilsynet, and Sikkerhedsstyrelsen

tools.name: dk_energy_get_regulation
tools.description: Retrieve a specific regulation by reference string

tools.name: dk_energy_search_grid_codes
tools.description: Search Energinet grid codes, technical regulations, and market rules

tools.name: dk_energy_get_grid_code
tools.description: Retrieve a specific grid code document by database ID

tools.name: dk_energy_search_decisions
tools.description: Search Forsyningstilsynet tariff decisions and market rulings

tools.name: dk_energy_about
tools.description: Return server metadata, regulator list, tool list, data coverage
